get.description:
Health check endpoint.

Verifies:
- Application is running
- Database connection is available

Returns 200 if healthy, 503 if unhealthy.
Return readiness status for platform health checks.

post.description: הערכת מס מקדימה לפני יצירת דוח שנתי.

get.description: Income + expense lines and taxable income calculation.
Israeli 2024 income tax calculation for this report.
Advance payments summary and final tax balance for this report.
Return list of issues blocking this report from being filed.

post.description: מילוי אוטומטי של שורות הכנסה/הוצאה מנתוני מע"מ של העסק לשנת המס.

get.description: List annual reports (optionally filter by tax_year).
Reports past their filing deadline that have not been submitted.

schema.title: Response List Overdue Api V1 Annual Reports Overdue Get

get.description: Get a single report with its schedule entries and status history.

post.description: Reopen a SUBMITTED report for amendment and record the reason (ADVISOR only).
Manually add a schedule to a report (auto-generated ones are created at report creation).

get.description: List all schedules for a specific annual report.

post.description: Mark a specific schedule as complete.

Move the report to a new status.

Only valid transitions are accepted (e.g. COLLECTING_DOCS → IN_PREPARATION).
Attempting an invalid jump returns 400.

Update the deadline type for a report.

Switching to 'extended' moves the deadline to January 31 of the year
after next — used for authorised electronic representatives (מייצגים).

get.description: All annual reports for a client, sorted newest year first.
All reports for a given tax year — the advisor's season dashboard.
Download a working-draft PDF (טיוטה לעיון) for the annual report.

post.description:
שמירת חוב מס / החזר מס מחושב על הדוח השנתי.

יש לקרוא ל-GET /tax-calculation תחילה, ולאחר מכן לשמור את התוצאה.
לא ניתן לשמור גם tax_due וגם refund_due בו-זמנית.

get.description: רשימת חיובים המקושרים לדוח שנתי זה (מידע בלבד).

Create a reporting entity and its first business in one request.

get.description: List clients with optional search, status filter, and sorting.

patch.description: Update client identity fields by ClientRecord.id.

post.description:
Create a VAT work item for a business / period.

Accessible by: receptionist, secretary, advisor.

Mark materials as complete: PENDING_MATERIALS → MATERIAL_RECEIVED.

Accessible by: receptionist, secretary, advisor.
Add an income or expense invoice to a work item.

get.description: List invoices for a work item, optionally filtered by type.

patch.description: Update an existing invoice. Not allowed after filing.

delete.description: Delete an invoice from a work item. Not allowed after filing.

post.description:
Mark data entry complete: DATA_ENTRY_IN_PROGRESS → READY_FOR_REVIEW.

Accessible by: secretary, advisor.

Advisor sends work item back for correction.
READY_FOR_REVIEW → DATA_ENTRY_IN_PROGRESS.

Confirm and file the VAT return.  Locks the period.

Advisor only.
Override amount requires written justification.

AdvancePaymentStatus.description: Lifecycle status of an advance payment.

AnnualReportSchedule.description: Annexes / schedules that may be required alongside the main form.

BinderIntakeMaterialRequest.description: פריט חומר בודד בתוך אירוע קבלה.

BinderReceiveRequest.description:
קבלת חומרים לקלסר.
אם binder_number קיים ופעיל — מוסיף intake לקלסר קיים.
אם לא — יוצר קלסר חדש.

client_id מועבר ב-URL: POST /clients/{client_id}/businesses

ChargeResponseSecretary.description: תגובה מצומצמת לסקרטרית — ללא נתונים פיננסיים.

ClientAnnualFilingType.title: ClientAnnualFilingType
ClientAnnualFilingType.description:
Filing profile of the annual return inside this domain.

This is not a general CRM/legal-entity classification. It is the filing
profile that drives primary form selection, deadline rules, and annex
generation for the annual-report workflow.

ClientBusinessCreateRequest.title: ClientBusinessCreateRequest
ClientBusinessCreateRequest.description:
פרטי עסק במסגרת פתיחת לקוח חדש.
שם העסק נדרש לפתיחת פעילות ראשונה.

DashboardOverviewResponse.title: DashboardOverviewResponse
DashboardOverviewResponse.description: Dashboard overview — advisor gets full data, secretary gets operational subset.

EntityType.title: EntityType
EntityType.description:
The legal/tax classification of a Client (legal entity).

OSEK_PATUR  — עוסק פטור: exempt from VAT collection; annual reporting only.
OSEK_MURSHE — עוסק מורשה: collects/deducts VAT; monthly or bi-monthly reporting.
COMPANY_LTD — חברה בע"מ: separate legal entity with its own ח"פ; monthly/bi-monthly.
EMPLOYEE    — שכיר: wage earner; no VAT reporting.

reference_date.title: Reference Date
reference_date.description: אם מסופק, ידלג על תקופות שתאריך היעד שלהן קודם לתאריך זה. ברירת מחדל: היום.

MaterialType.title: MaterialType
MaterialType.description: Type of material received in the binder.

ObligationType.title: ObligationType
ObligationType.description:
Regulatory obligation category for TaxCalendarEntry.

NATIONAL_INSURANCE is reserved but not yet wired to a DeadlineRuleType
(intentionally unsupported in PR 1 of the tax-calendar foundation).

PaymentMethod.title: PaymentMethod
PaymentMethod.description: Supported payment methods for an advance payment.

PrimaryAnnualReportForm.title: PrimaryAnnualReportForm
PrimaryAnnualReportForm.description: Primary ITA annual-return forms handled by this domain.

ReportStage.title: ReportStage
ReportStage.description: Higher-level workflow stages used by dashboards.

SignatureRequestCreatedResponse.title: SignatureRequestCreatedResponse
SignatureRequestCreatedResponse.description: Returned once on creation with the signing link token.

SignerViewResponse.title: SignerViewResponse
SignerViewResponse.description: Minimal — no internal IDs or financial data.

VatType.title: VatType
VatType.description: VAT reporting frequency for a legal entity (Client level).
